what_it_does: This file stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment, declaring its id, channel, attachment type, target board item, and the time it was added.
observations: File contains no body content beyond the YAML frontmatter
standouts: Target references an external board item using a board:// URI
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed set of metadata fields
References an external entity with a URI-style board:// identifier
concerns: No descriptive content or context beyond the metadata fields; meaning depends on external board item
notes: A minimal channel-attachment record that links a provider-registry attachment to a specific board item and timestamps the addition.
questions: What does the board_items attachment_type signify semantically?
What is the content or purpose of the linked board item?
Who or what added this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the file records an attachment-to-board-item association rather than describing why the association exists.
intention_signals: To record that a specific board item is attached to a provider-registry channel memory entry and to timestamp when that link was created.
contribution: The attachment-to-board-item mapping and its creation timestamp for provider-registry channel memory.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in the provider-registry channel that links attachment att-5d31d7d1 to board item item-5741bd84 as a board_items attachment, recorded at 2026-06-22T15:47:19Z.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is attached to a channel memory entry in the provider-registry channel.
